verses.text: Topa in Moses leh Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen hi
Israel mite in amau' dialkhai gei ciatah a beh dialkhaite tawh phual sat ding uh a, amaute in a pang simah kikhopna buk mai ngatin phual sat ding uh hi

Nisuahna lampangah phual a sat dingte pen Judah' giahphual dialkhai a neite hi ding a, a makaite leh a mi phazah a nuai-a bang ahi hi: Judah mite a makaipa pen Amminadab' tapa Nahshon hi a, ama pawlmi tul sawmsagih leh tul li leh za guk a pha hi. Issakhar mite a makaipa pen Zuar' tapa Nethanel hi a, ama pawl mitul sawmnga leh tul li leh za li a pha hi. Zebulun mite a makaipa pen Helon' tapa Eliab hi a, ama pawl mitul sawmnga leh tul sagih leh za li a pha hi. Judah' phualah a pawlpawlin a omte a vekpi-in tul za leh tul sawmgiatleh tul guk leh za li a pha hi. A kipaikhiat ciangin amau masa ding uh hi

A leitaw lampangah a pawlpawlin Reuben' giahphual dialkhai a neite hi ding a, a makaite leh a mi phazah a nuai-a bang ahi hi. Reuben mite a makaipa pen Shedeur' tapa Elizur hi a, ama pawl mitul sawmli leh tul guk leh za nga a pha hi. Simeon mite a makaipa pen Zurishaddai' tapa Shelumiel hi a, amapawl mi tul sawmnga leh tul kua leh za thum a pha hi. Gad mite a makaipa pen Reuel' tapa Eliasaf hi a, ama pawl mi tulsawmli leh tul nga leh za guk leh sawmnga a pha hi. Reuben' giahphualah a pawlpawlin a omte a vekpi-in tul za leh tulsawmnga leh tul khat leh za li leh sawmnga a pha hi. Amaute a nihna-ah paikhia ding uh hi
Tua ciangin kikhopna buk pen, giahphualte' laizangah a om Levi mite' phual tawh kikhin khawm ding a, a phual sat hun mah bangun amau' san ciatah a dialkhai uh tawh paikhia ding uh hi

A nitumna lampangah a pawlpawlin Efraim giahphual dialkhai a neite hi ding a, a makaite leh a mi phazah a nuai-a bang ahi hi. Efraim mite a makaipa pen Ammihud' tapa Elishama hi a, ama pawlmi tul sawmli leh za nga a pha hi. Manasseh mite a makaipa pen Pedahzur' tapa Gamaliel hi a, amapawl mi tul sawmthum leh tul nih leh za nih a pha hi. Benjamin mite a makaipa pen Gideoni' tapa Abidan hi a, ama pawlmi tul sawmthum leh tul nga leh za li a pha hi. Efraim giahphualah a pawlpawlin a omte a vekpi-in tul za leh tul giatleh za khat a pha hi. Amaute a thumna-ah paikhia ding uh hi

A leilu lampangah a pawlpawlin Dan giahphual dialkhai a neite hi ding a, a makaite leh a mi phazah a nuai-a bang ahi hi. Dan mite a makaipa pen Ammishaddai' tapa Ahiezer hi a, ama pawlmi tul sawmguk leh tul nih leh za sagih a pha hi. Asher mite a makaipa pen Okran' tapa Pagiel hi a, ama pawl tulsawmli leh tul khat leh za nga a pha hi. Naftali mite a makaipa pen Enan' tapa Ahira hi a, ama pawl mi tulsawmnga leh tul thum leh za li a pha hi. Dan' giahphuala om mi a vekpi-in tul za leh tul sawmnga leh tul sagihleh za guk a pha hi. Amaute a dialkhai tawh kizui-in a pai nunung ding uh ahi hi
Hihte pen Israel mite a beh zui-a kisim hi a, a pawlpawlin giahphualah a om mi a vekpi-in tul za guk leh tul thum leh za nga leh sawmnga a pha hi
Ahih hangin Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Israel mite lakah Levi mite kisimkhawm lo hi
Tua bangin Israel mite gamta uh hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin a beh tawh kizui-in a innkuankuanin amau' dialkhaite' gei-ah giahphual sat uh a, tua bangmahin paikhia uh hi.
